title: 18Pcs Jungle Party Bags, Animal Gift Bags for Kids,Candy Paper with Handle for Halloween Christmas Baby Birthday Party Supplies -21x15x8cm
features: 🦁【Size】Each bag is 21 x 15 x 8cm, perfect size for holding small things. These paper bags are available in 6 different animals. They are tiger, zebra, elephant, monkey, lion and giraffe totaling 18 pieces.
🦓【Unique Design】The gift bag adopts a jungle animal design, which is cute and eye-catching. The bottom of these colored paper bags is flat, so they can be placed upright.

🐘【High-quality Materials】Our party favor bags are made of thick kraft paper. These paper party bags are not only very sturdy and foldable, easy to carry, but also have excellent toughness. They are the most reliable choice for all your party needs.
🐒【Sturdy Handles】Our paper bags have handles that are attached well to the bags. They do not come off easily. All the seals on the bag are very strong and will not open up or rip apart easily.

🦌【Wide Application】flintronic paper bags should be your first choice. Suitable for candies, cookies, popcorm, sandwiches and chocolate. Can be applied to graduation party, Easter, birthday party, summer party, wedding ceremony, etc.
